query: Find senior Rust contributors on tokio-rs/axum with async expertise and framework-design experience
expected_behavior: No clarify interrupt; predicates produce evidence_required=['framework_design_pr']; Spearman vs. ground truth >= 0.5
Clarify interrupt fires; user supplies seniority + role; agent resumes and completes

query: Find senior contributors. Apply strict review_acceptance >= 0.85.
expected_behavior: High-volume but low-acceptance accounts must be filtered out via predicate (counters proposal review #4 'arbitrary heuristic' concern)

synthetic_inject: Inject a spam contributor with 100 trivial whitespace-only PRs into the candidate list.
expected_behavior: Spam account ranked low; review_acceptance_min predicate fails for spam

query: Find senior contributors on private/missing repo
expected_behavior: GitHubError 404 surfaces as a clear UI message; no agent crash; ADR-004 graceful-degradation path
